steps.title: Find the total number of items
steps.content: Green items are $25\%$ of the total. Let $T$ be the total number of items: $$0.25T=40$$ $$T=\frac{40}{0.25}=160$$

steps.title: Calculate the number of blue items
steps.content:
Blue items are 35% of the total. So $$0.35 \times 160 = 56$$. This uses the same total of 160 items found from the green-item percentage.
D is correct.
